name: aetna-imaging
description: Aetna commercial hospital-outpatient MRI precertification, submitted expedited. Exercises the wave 52-7b Aetna overlay rules: R-PA-AETNA-007 flags the hospital-outpatient (POS 22) MRI with no site-of-care justification, and R-PA-AETNA-008 flags the expedited request with no clinical urgency stated. R-PA-AETNA-001/002 pass (CPB cited, clinical note attached); 003 fires info (no submission channel); 004/005/006/009/010 are vacuous for this packet.

documents.name: aetna-imaging-form.txt
documents.text:
Aetna Choice POS II Prior Authorization Request
Patient: Mark T Lee
DOB: 1979-02-03
Member ID: W987654321
Date of service: 2026-06-20
Place of service: 22
Requested procedure: MRI brain without contrast CPT 70551
Dx: R51.9 headache
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
EXPEDITED / urgent request.
Setting: hospital outpatient imaging.
Medical necessity: new daily persistent headache; see Aetna Clinical Policy Bulletin for advanced imaging.
Signature: Neuro MD, 2026-06-10

documents.name: aetna-imaging-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: new daily persistent headache for three weeks.
History of present illness: progressive, worse in the mornings.
Physical exam: nonfocal neurologic exam.
Assessment and plan: obtain MRI brain to exclude an intracranial mass lesion.
Note date: 2026-06-10
Signed: Neuro MD, 2026-06-10
